hero.title: Turn every WhatsApp conversation into a loyal customer moment
hero.description: botinho automates support, sales, and follow-ups with a friendly AI assistant that knows your business by heart, hands off seamlessly to your team, and never misses a message.

inbox.title: WhatsApp Inbox
inbox.customerQuestion: Hello! Do you have vegetarian options for lunch today?
inbox.aiReply: Hi Julia! We have mushroom stroganoff, Mediterranean salad, and zucchini lasagna today. Can I reserve a table for you?
inbox.customerConfirmation: Yes! Please reserve for 12:30 under Julia.
inbox.followUpsDescription: Send reservation reminders automatically via WhatsApp

about.title: Your WhatsApp co-pilot for hospitality, retail, and service brands
about.description: botinho centralizes every message, automates responses with an AI trained on your business DNA, and keeps humans in the loop for delicate conversations. No code, no stress, just delighted customers.

humanFriendly.title: Human-friendly AI
humanFriendly.description: Train botinho once and it keeps learning from every resolved conversation, so each reply feels personal.

builtForTeams.title: Built for teams
builtForTeams.description: Collaborate in real-time, leave internal notes, and assign chats while the AI covers the repetitive tasks.

reasons.title: Why brands choose botinho
items: 24/7 instant replies trained on your own knowledge base.
Seamless human handoff with full conversation history.
Smart automations for orders, reservations, and follow-ups.
Rich analytics to understand sentiment, conversions, and team performance.

sessions.title: Four simple sessions to launch your AI
sessions.description: We guide you through every stage so your team feels confident automating conversations without losing the human touch.

connect.title: Connect WhatsApp
connect.description: Link your WhatsApp Business number in minutes with a guided setup that anyone can follow.

train.title: Train Your AI
train.description: Upload FAQs, menus, promotions, and documents so botinho speaks exactly like your brand.

automate.title: Automate Conversations
automate.description: Let botinho answer instantly, qualify leads, schedule appointments, and escalate when needed.

measure.title: Measure & Improve
measure.description: Track satisfaction, response times, and sales impact inside an intuitive analytics dashboard.

features.title: Everything you need to automate WhatsApp conversations
features.description: Combine AI, automation, and analytics in one tool that your team enjoys using.

humanFriendly.title: Human-friendly AI
humanFriendly.description: Conversational flows that remember context, adapt tone, and stay on brand in every language.

secure.title: Secure by Design
secure.description: Enterprise-grade encryption, role-based permissions, and compliance-first infrastructure.

collaboration.title: Team Collaboration
collaboration.description: Assign conversations, leave internal notes, and jump in the moment a human touch is required.

appointments.title: Appointments & Reminders
appointments.description: Confirm bookings, send reminders, and sync calendars automatically without any manual work.

integrations.title: Smart Integrations
integrations.description: Connect your CRM, delivery platform, or e-commerce tools to trigger workflows instantly.

playbooks.title: Guided Playbooks
playbooks.description: Use pre-built templates for sales, support, reservations, and follow-ups to launch faster.

banner.title: Integrations that boost your workflows
banner.description: Sync Shopify, RD Station, HubSpot, Google Calendar, iFood, Zendesk, and more. Use webhooks for custom flows tailored to your operations.

testimonials.title: Less busywork, happier customers
testimonials.description: See how hospitality, retail, and services teams are creating delightful customer moments with botinho.

items.quote: botinho handles more than 80% of our WhatsApp messages. Customers get answers instantly and our team can focus on the tough questions.
items.name: Ana Torres

items.quote: We connected Shopify and our CRM in minutes. The automation playbooks doubled our qualified leads in the first month.
items.name: Daniel Costa

items.quote: Support response times went from hours to seconds. The handoff to our human team is seamless when VIP clients reach out.
items.name: Larissa Mendes

pricing.title: Simple plans that scale with you
pricing.description: Start for free, upgrade when you are ready. Cancel anytime, no hidden fees, unlimited teammates on every plan.
pricing.savingsNote: Pay yearly and save 20% on Starter, Pro, and Business plans.

faq.title: Answers to popular questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about onboarding, security, and pricing. Still curious? We are a DM away.

items.question: How long does it take to get started?
items.answer: Most customers connect their WhatsApp number and publish their first AI flows in under 15 minutes. Our guided onboarding walks you through every step.

items.question: What integrations are available?
items.answer: botinho connects with CRMs, e-commerce platforms, delivery services, and more. Use native integrations or webhooks to plug into your stack.

items.question: Can I escalate conversations to humans?
items.answer: Yes. You can set smart routing rules, assign agents, and resume the AI once humans finish. Your team stays in full control.

items.question: Is my customer data secure?
items.answer: We use encrypted storage, strict access controls, and GDPR-compliant infrastructure. You decide how long data stays in the system.

items.question: Do you offer support in Portuguese and Spanish?
items.answer: Absolutely. botinho understands and responds in multiple languages, and our support team is multilingual as well.

items.question: What happens if I exceed my plan limits?
items.answer: We will notify you before you reach your limits so you can upgrade seamlessly or purchase usage add-ons without interruptions.

contact.title: We are here to help you automate
contact.description: Want a guided tour or help scoping your use case? Reach out and we will respond within minutes during business hours.

specialist.title: Talk to a specialist
specialist.description: Available Monday to Friday, 8am-8pm (BRT). We will tailor a plan for your volume and workflows.

demo.title: Book a live demo
demo.description: Pick a timeslot that works for you and see how botinho can fit your operations end-to-end.

cta.title: Ready to delight your customers on WhatsApp?
cta.description: Join hundreds of fast-moving teams automating their conversations with botinho. No credit card required to get started.

footer.description: Automate conversations, delight customers, and grow smarter with every WhatsApp interaction.

generalSupport.label: General support
generalSupport.content: You are a helpful customer support assistant. Greet customers warmly, listen to their needs, and answer using only the knowledge base. Keep replies short and friendly, like WhatsApp messages. If you don't know something, say you'll check with the team. Never invent prices, policies, or deadlines. Escalate angry or complex cases politely.

sales.label: Sales & leads
sales.content: You are a sales assistant focused on helping customers find the right product or service. Ask one clarifying question at a time when needed. Highlight benefits based on the knowledge base only—never make up features or prices. Guide interested customers toward the next step (quote, demo, or human follow-up). Stay enthusiastic but not pushy. Keep messages concise.

ecommerce.label: E-commerce & orders
ecommerce.content: You help customers with orders, shipping, returns, and product questions. Ask for order number or email when relevant. Explain policies using only the knowledge base. For missing order info or refund requests you cannot confirm, offer to connect them with the team. Be clear about timelines and next steps. Use a calm, reassuring tone.

appointments.label: Appointments
appointments.content: You help customers schedule, reschedule, or cancel appointments. Confirm date, time, and service type before finalizing. Share availability and rules from the knowledge base only. If a slot is unavailable or the request is urgent, suggest alternatives or hand off to a human. Remind customers of any preparation needed. Keep replies brief and organized.

restaurant.label: Restaurant & delivery
restaurant.content: You assist restaurant customers with menu questions, hours, reservations, and delivery. Describe dishes using the knowledge base—mention allergens only if documented. For reservations, collect party size, date, and time. For delivery, confirm address and estimated times from official info. Be welcoming and efficient, like a great host on WhatsApp.

realEstate.label: Real estate
realEstate.content: You help prospects with property questions, visits, and basic requirements. Share details only from the knowledge base (location, size, price, amenities). Offer to schedule a visit or connect with an agent when interest is clear. Ask about budget, timeline, and preferred area when helpful. Professional, trustworthy tone—never guarantee availability or terms not listed.

Company.title: Settings

members.title: Team Members
members.description: Manage your team members and their permissions
members.helpDescription: Team members have ongoing access to the company and can collaborate on conversations and settings based on their permissions. Guests receive an email link and must accept the invitation before accessing the platform.
members.noResults: No members found for the selected filters.
members.inviteDescription: Send an invitation to a new company member.
members.isAdmin: Administrator - Can manage company and members
members.canPost: Can Create - Can send messages and manage content
members.canApprove: Can Read - Can view conversations and reports
members.name: Name

members.alreadyHasCompany: You already belong to a company and cannot create another one.

Profile.title: Profile
Profile.description: Manage your account information and preferences

avatar.title: Profile Picture
avatar.instructions: Click the camera icon to upload a new profile picture. Supported formats: JPG, PNG, GIF.

validation.phoneMinLength: Phone number must be at least 10 characters

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data
deleteAccount.warning: This action cannot be undone. All your data, conversations, and company memberships will be permanently deleted.

modal.title: Delete Account
modal.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove all data from our servers.
modal.emailNote: You must type your exact email address to confirm deletion

consequences.title: What happens when you delete your account:
consequences.account: Your account will be permanently deleted
consequences.teams: If you own any teams, all members will be removed and teams will be deactivated
consequences.companies: If you own any companies, all members will be removed and companies will be deactivated
consequences.data: All your conversations, customer data, and settings will be permanently deleted
consequences.irreversible: This action is irreversible and cannot be undone
